description: Recto: Fragment from the top of a letter or draft in Judaeo-Arabic. Mentions silver and sending something (עלי אלפצה אלדי לל . . . שי וכנתו קלת אן . . . פאללה אללה תבעתוה . . . עליך . . . . Most of the text on verso, and the marginal text on recto, are in a different hand which is reminiscent of the hand of Nāṣir al-Adīb al-ʿIbrī.
